title: Best Plastic-Free Pet Water Fountain (Ceramic & Steel)
meta: Ceramic and stainless fountains for cats prone to chin acne or plastic sensitivity.
intro: Plastic bowls can harbor bacteria in micro-scratches and trigger feline chin acne. Ceramic or steel solves it.
